matching_diagnosis: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae (hvKP) syndrome with metastatic infection
differential_reasoning: The final diagnosis is semantically equivalent to the listed hvKP syndrome with metastatic infection, since disseminated hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae describes the same organism with metastatic spread.
